tools.name: list_boards
tools.description: List boards available to the caller's FeatureJet API key.

tools.name: get_board
tools.description: Get one board by slug.

tools.name: create_board
tools.description:
Create a new feedback board, as a DRAFT.

        `slug` is the board's URL path segment (lowercase, hyphenated, unique);
        `name` is the display name. The new board's public URL 404s until a
        human publishes it from the dashboard -- `publish_board` is off by
        default (403 `publi

tools.name: publish_board
tools.description:
Publish a board so it is live at its public URL.

        OFF BY DEFAULT. Putting a board on the public internet is a human
        decision: unless the FeatureJet deployment has opted in, this returns
        403 `publish_disabled` and the owner publishes from the dashboard.
        Where it is ena

tools.name: unpublish_board
tools.description:
Return a board to draft so its public URL stops serving it.

        Nothing is deleted; publish it again to bring it back.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List posts for a board, optionally filtered by status, search, or tag.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get one post by board slug and post id.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a post on a board.

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Update mutable post fields.

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Delete a post by hiding it through the developer API.

tools.name: list_votes
tools.description: List vote metadata for a post.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments for a post.

tools.name: create_comment
tools.description: Comment on a post as the board team, optionally replying to a comment.

tools.name: get_queue
tools.description:
Top UNCLAIMED posts in the owner's curated build order.

        Owner-ranked posts (queue_rank, lower = sooner) come first, then
        unranked planned posts by votes. Call this to find the next thing to
        build, then claim_post before starting work.

tools.name: claim_post
tools.description:
Atomically claim a post before working on it (double-work guard).

        ttl_seconds defaults to 3600 (max 86400); re-claiming with the same
        key extends the lease. Returns 409 if another key holds a live claim.

tools.name: release_post
tools.description: Release a post's claim so other agents can pick it up.

tools.name: add_evidence
tools.description:
Attach implementation evidence to a post (shown publicly).

        kind is one of branch|commit|pr|transcript|url; ref is the branch
        name, commit sha, or URL. Voters see these in the post page's
        "Implementation" section.

tools.name: propose_status
tools.description:
Propose a status change for the board owner to confirm.

        The agent-honest way to mark work done: nothing changes on the
        public board and no voter is notified until a human confirms the
        proposal from the dashboard. status is one of
        open|planned|in_progress|shipped|decl

tools.name: get_changelog
tools.description: List shipped posts for a board.

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Get read-only analytics for a board.

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Confirm the caller's API key by listing accessible boards.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Check MCP and FeatureJet API reachability for the caller's key.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_posts, get_post, list_votes, list_comments, get_queue, get_changelog · Private data: list_boards, whoami · Public sink: publish_board, unpublish_board, get_post, create_post, update_post, delete_post, list_votes, list_comments, create_comment, claim_post, release_post, add_evidence · Destructive: delete_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_posts, get_post, list_votes, list_comments, get_queue, get_changelog · Private data: list_boards, whoami · Public sink: publish_board, unpublish_board, get_post, create_post, update_post, delete_post, list_votes, list_comments, create_comment, claim_post, release_post, add_evidence · Destructive: delete_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
